
=== TEAM RATING METRIC COMPARISON ===
Data: 276 doubles matches from CSV

--- Predictive performance on real doubles matches ---
| Metric        | Accuracy | logLoss | Brier  | calMAE |
|---------------|----------|---------|--------|--------|
| arithmetic    |   63.0% | 0.6723 | 0.2397 | 0.0765 |
| harmonic      |   62.7% | 0.6727 | 0.2399 | 0.0866 |
| softHarmonic  |   62.7% | 0.6725 | 0.2398 | 0.0879 |

--- 2000 + 1000 vs 1500 + 1500 expected win probabilities ---
| Metric        | Team A rating | Team B rating | P(A wins) |
|---------------|---------------|---------------|-----------|
| arithmetic    |          1500 |          1500 |     50.0% |
| harmonic      |          1333 |          1500 |     27.7% |
| softHarmonic  |          1400 |          1500 |     36.0% |

--- Interpretation ---
Lowest logLoss on real doubles data: arithmetic (0.6723)
Lowest calibration error: arithmetic (0.0765)
